name: io.github.AetherWave-Studio/aetherwave-mcp
description: One MCP tool surface for music, image, video, and audio generation across Suno, Grok Imagine, Seedance, Kling, Hailuo, Wan, VEO, Ideogram, and GPT Image 2 - one API key, one credit pool.

environmentVariables.name: AETHERWAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: AetherWave Studio API key (starts with aw_live_). Generate one at https://aetherwavestudio.com/developers - first key grants 50 free credits, no card required.
